next_action: continue by choosing one local-safe prerequisite; do not execute broad continuation, cross external boundaries, deploy, publish, spend, contact customers, take legal or business action, promote claims, use secrets, use credentials, activate services, publish source control, commit to a roadmap, or promise deadlines

next_action_surfaces.public_safe_note: Continue-request triage questions only; broad continuation execution is not authorized.
Smallest prerequisite selection questions only; deployment, customer, legal, money, and publication work remain blocked.
Dependency-check questions only; unknown hard constraints remain AwaitingEvidence.
Local edit scope questions only; external systems, website publication, DNS, accounts, and services remain untouched.
Verification-plan questions only; completion is not claimed without focused checks and preflight evidence.
Stop-rule questions only; continuation does not create roadmap commitment or deadline promise.
Evidence receipt planning only; no secrets, credentials, customer data, provider accounts, or private paths are recorded.
Handoff-summary questions only; staging, committing, pushing, publishing, and deployment require explicit later request.
